app.title: Math with Smiles
app.subtitle: Learn with the Ten Frames method

game.countingDesc: Use Ten Frames to learn counting from 0 to 10!
game.additionDesc: There are already {{num1}} dots. Add {{num2}} more!
game.additionHint: Tap empty cells to add dots!
game.subtractionDesc: There are {{num1}} dots. Remove {{num2}} of them!
game.subtractionHint: Tap on dots to remove them!
game.puzzleDesc: There are {{number}} dots. How many more to make 10?

info.title: About Ten Frames - The American Method!
info.whatDesc: Ten Frames are an educational method used in American schools to help children understand numbers from 0 to 10.
info.benefitsDesc: Quick quantity recognition, understanding number composition, developing addition/subtraction skills.
